creator: swills@mouf.net
text:
Hi,

This breaks several ports:

databases/rubygem-couchrest:
    Unable to resolve dependencies: couchrest requires multi_json (~> =
1.0.0)
   =20
databases/rubygem-dm-serializer:
    Unable to resolve dependencies: dm-serializer requires multi_json =
(~> 1.0.3)

databases/rubygem-dm-types:
    Unable to resolve dependencies: dm-types requires multi_json (~> =
1.0.3)

Please talk to upstream and have them loosen the dependencies to ~> 1.0.

BTW, many ruby modules follow semantic versioning. See:

https://github.com/rubygems/rubygems.org/issues/409

http://semver.org/

Steve
